data.name: Temperature_Source
data.value: Errors raised when constructing a Temperature value from an out-of-range input.

data.name: Amount_Source
data.value: Errors raised when performing operations that combine monetary Amount values.

data.name: Bank_Source
data.value: Errors raised while validating an uploaded bank statement file against its declared metadata (statement period and totals).

data.name: Temperature_BelowAbsoluteZero_Title
data.value: Temperature below absolute zero

data.name: Temperature_BelowAbsoluteZero_Description
data.value: This error occurs when trying to instantiate a temperature with a value that is below absolute zero.

data.name: Temperature_BelowAbsoluteZero_Rule
data.value: Temperature cannot go below absolute zero because absolute zero is the point where particles have minimum possible energy.

data.name: Temperature_BelowAbsoluteZero_Message
data.value: Failed to instantiate temperature: the value {0} {1} is below absolute zero.

data.name: Temperature_BelowAbsoluteZero_ShortMessage
data.value: Temperature is below absolute zero.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Title
data.value: Amount currency mismatch

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Description
data.value: This error occurs when trying to use multiple amounts together in an operation while they are expressed in different currencies.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Rule
data.value: All monetary operations must involve amounts expressed in the same currency.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Message
data.value: Failed to perform the monetary operation because the involved amounts are expressed in different currencies: {0} and {1}.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_ShortMessage
data.value: Currency mismatch

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Cause1
data.value: Amounts were used in a monetary operation without having been converted to the same currency.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Hint1
data.value: Verify whether all amounts involved in the operation were converted to a common currency before being used together.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Cause2
data.value: Amounts expected to be expressed in the same currency were provided with different currencies.

data.name: Amount_CurrencyMismatch_Hint2
data.value: Check the currencies associated with each amount and confirm whether a common currency was expected for this operation.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Title
data.value: Transaction date outside statement period

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Description
data.value: This error occurs when trying to validate a bank statement file that contains one or more transactions dated outside the statement period.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Rule
data.value: All transactions must occur within the statement period.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Message
data.value: Transaction dated {0} is outside the statement period [{1};{2}].

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_ShortMessage
data.value: Transaction date is outside the statement period.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Cause1
data.value: The transaction date provided in the statement file is incorrect or inconsistent with the actual transaction date.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Hint1
data.value: Verify the transaction date present in the input file and confirm its consistency with the actual transaction timeline.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Cause2
data.value: The statement period defined in the file does not match the actual coverage period of the transactions.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Hint2
data.value: Check whether the statement start and end dates in the file align with the period covered by the transactions.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Cause3
data.value: The transaction was posted after the statement was generated but was mistakenly included in the file.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Hint3
data.value: Determine whether late-posted transactions were included in the statement generation process.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Cause4
data.value: An internal processing error caused the transaction date to be shifted during data transformation or import.

data.name: Bank_DateOutOfPeriod_Hint4
data.value: Examine the data import and transformation stages to confirm that transaction dates are preserved without alteration.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Title
data.value: Statement total amount mismatch

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Description
data.value: This error occurs when trying to validate a bank statement file whose declared total amount does not match the sum of the individual transaction amounts.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Rule
data.value: The statement total amount must equal the sum of all transaction amounts included in the statement.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Message
data.value: The declared statement total amount ({0}) does not match the computed total amount from transactions ({1}).

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_ShortMessage
data.value: Statement total amount mismatch.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Cause1
data.value: The total amount declared in the statement file does not match the sum of the individual transaction amounts.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Hint1
data.value: Verify the declared total amount in the file and compare it with the sum of all transaction amounts.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Cause2
data.value: One or more transactions are missing or duplicated in the statement file.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Hint2
data.value: Check whether all expected transactions are present exactly once in the statement file.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Cause3
data.value: A rounding or precision error occurred when calculating the statement total amount.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Hint3
data.value: Examine how rounding and precision rules were applied when computing the statement total.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Cause4
data.value: An internal processing error altered transaction amounts during file parsing or transformation.

data.name: Bank_TotalMismatch_Hint4
data.value: Inspect the file parsing and transformation stages to confirm that transaction amounts remain unchanged.

data.name: ValueObject_Cause1
data.value: The value entered manually by a user is invalid.

data.name: ValueObject_Hint1
data.value: Verify the value entered by the user and assess its compliance with domain rules.

data.name: ValueObject_Cause2
data.value: The value received from an external system (API, message, etc.) is invalid.

data.name: ValueObject_Hint2
data.value: Check the data provided by the upstream system and evaluate its validity against domain rules.

data.name: ValueObject_Cause3
data.value: The value was loaded from corrupted or outdated persisted data.

data.name: ValueObject_Hint3
data.value: Examine the persisted data source to determine whether stored values comply with current domain rules.

data.name: ValueObject_Cause4
data.value: The value was computed internally without using domain-safe methods.

data.name: ValueObject_Hint4
data.value: Inspect the internal computation logic to confirm that domain invariants are preserved.

data.name: ValueObject_Cause5
data.value: The value originates from system configuration or defaults that are incorrect or outdated.

data.name: ValueObject_Hint5
data.value: Review the relevant configuration or default parameters to assess their compliance with domain rules.
